projectStatus.focus: Implementation of the smallest inspectable continuous-state substrate before introducing memory or autonomy.

logs.title: Native Digital Life Vault Ingested
logs.summary: Integrated the master plan for Stark's Native Digital Life, detailing 12 implementation phases from specification hardening to native renderer research.

logs.title: Public StarkAGI website prepared
logs.summary: Created a GitHub Pages-ready landing page with a futuristic glass interface, local Anime.js bundle, and a placeholder repository link.

logs.title: Progress and devlog system added
logs.summary: Added a JSON-powered project progress page so future logs, milestone changes, and research updates can be edited without touching page layout code.

logs.title: Native kernel roadmap published
logs.summary: Documented the initial direction for a local-first StarkAGI kernel based on continuous state, memory resonance, sleep review, and bounded autonomy.

milestones.title: Specification Hardening
milestones.summary: Define axioms, authority, and non-negotiable red lines.

milestones.title: Continuous State Micro-Life Core
milestones.summary: M1: Isolated C++ core with fixed-length state and inspection logs.

milestones.title: State Region Stabilization
milestones.summary: Stabilize functional regions for perception and cognitive state.

milestones.title: Feedback & Correction Engine
milestones.summary: Implement gated fusion and feedback weighting.

milestones.title: Chronicle Evidence Spine
milestones.summary: Create a durable evidence trail of cognitive state changes.

milestones.title: Native Memory Bridge
milestones.summary: Bridge the state core to an external MemoryStore.

milestones.title: Drive Engine
milestones.summary: Implement intent projection and goal pressure.

milestones.title: Projection Engine
milestones.summary: Map internal state to external representations.

milestones.title: Ollama Renderer Bridge
milestones.summary: Connect the core mind to an LLM 'mouth' for output.

milestones.title: 24/7 Daemon Runtime
milestones.summary: Transition the core to a persistent background runtime.

milestones.title: Work Mode Integration
milestones.summary: Integrate core cognition into software engineering workflows.

milestones.title: Obsidian Mirror
milestones.summary: Export braincells to an Obsidian mirror for human review.

milestones.title: Native Renderer Research
milestones.summary: Explore native visualization of cognitive states.

notes.title: The Continuous-State Shift
notes.body: Stark is moving away from the Transformer paradigm toward a local-first continuous-state runtime that manages perception, memory, and intent without tokenization.

notes.title: Language as Rendering
notes.body: In this architecture, language is a rendering layer. The native kernel owns the intent; the LLM merely polishes the final output.
